pr.title: chore: sync 299 Replit agent commits to master (Tasks #242–#246)
pr.body:
## Summary

This PR syncs 299 commits from the Replit agent workspace to `master`. These commits span multiple completed tasks:

- **Task #242**: Flashcard improvements and quiz fixes
- **Task #246**: SEO crawler frequency — dynamic sitemap `changefreq`/priority, delta sitemap (`/sitemap-delta.xml`), Google Indexing API tier system, bot rate limit 3000 RPM, BreadcrumbList/SiteLinksSearchBox JSON-LD, Bing nightly prioritization

## Changes by area

### Edge Proxy (`workers/edge-proxy/src/`)
- `index.ts`: `BOT_RATE_LIMIT_RPM` 1200→3000 (enforced), delta sitemap root-path alias, dynamic changefreq helper, unverified-bot 120 RPM on page renders
- `d1-queries.ts`: `getDeltaSitemapEntries()` with `COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)` 48h window

### Backend (`artifacts/syrabit-backend/`)
- `seo_engine.py`: `_changefreq_from_lastmod()` applied to chapter + learn sitemaps
- `google_indexing_client.py`: Tier system with URL parsing fix, T2+T3 combined 70% cap, T1 floor protection
- `seo_fanout.py`: Delta sitemap Google ping on every publish
- `routes/bot_discovery.py`: Bing nightly submission prioritises recently-updated pages

### Frontend (`artifacts/syrabit/src/lib/`)
- `jsonld.js`: BreadcrumbList upgraded to full board/class/subject hierarchy; SiteLinksSearchBox confirmed via SearchAction
pr.author: shaitanfiles-cloud
